EXP_METADATA.experimental_design: 2 2-factorial treatment design,randomized complete block design with four blocks
EXP_METADATA.experimental_factor_comb: Composted poultry manure fertilizer with biochar application (CPB);Composted poultry manure fertilizer without biochar application (CP);Mineral fertilizer with biochar application (MFB);Mineral fertilizer without biochar application (MF)
